metadata.name: Claim Missing Miles from a Hotel Partner

description: A frequent flyer member stayed at a partner hotel but did not receive miles for it. They are requesting a manual credit.

nodes.task_description: Get the member's frequent flyer number and a copy of their hotel receipt.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects the required information and proof of stay.

nodes.task_description: Verify the hotel stay and calculate the number of miles that should have been awarded based on the partnership agreement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the stay and calculates the correct mileage.

nodes.task_description: Manually credit the miles to the member's account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the miles to the member's account.
